[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Custom Signs](https://www.banners.com/custom-signs) 3. [A-Frame Signs](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/a-frames) 4. Replacement A Frame Signage # Replacement A-Frame Signs ### Custom Replacement A-Frame Signs ![White a-frame with a sign floating out from it.](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/Replacement-Sign_Fast-Freddy's-Fries_300-x-250px-RIOT-replacement-sign.jpg) * [Material](#5f2fa61b-e2e9-4451-86b7-e97fba16b6de) * [Artwork](#aee17f4a-a457-4bb0-8ecc-dcb0ac142403) * [Order Process](#f8189204-8cd0-49c2-8550-e154525cdbc3) * [Shipping](#a2f2b83c-bdba-4d6b-b59c-6e5b98d57d68) * [Production Times](#14b4e20c-52c7-42d3-8da2-0331f3c63325) ### Yard Sign Material Yard signs are made of out corrugated plastic. Corrugated plastic is sometimes referred to as "plastic cardboard" because of the hollow "flutes" on the inside of the material. Yard signs are lightweight, plastic and waterproof. They are a great form of outdoor advertising. [**Click here to request a sample packet of materials**](https://www.banners.com/sample-packet-request) #### Yard Sign Features: * Standard 4 mm thickness * Full color printed signs * Printed with a 1/2" white edge * Slightly ribbed surface * Waterproof * Can withstand extreme hot and cold temperatures * Lasts up to 2 years outdoors * Add unlimited text, colors, logos, and graphics ## Artwork ### Artwork Guidelines Files that print best are .eps files converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf, .tif, and .jpg formats. If you don’t have access to or are unsure if you have a high-resolution file, our professional graphic designers will be happy to assist with this. ### Order Proofs If you are looking to be able to give your order one last look and make sure all the information and images are correct, requesting an order proof will allow you that benefit. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order including pricing, and your billing and shipping information. Please note if you receive a proof, you will need to email or call back your customer service representative with approval before your order will go into production. ### Color Match Proof System If your project is color critical, we highly recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details please contact our team of friendly Customer Service Representatives who are all professional graphic designers to assist you with any questions you might have. Did we answer all of your questions? If not, please give us a call and one of our customer service representatives would be happy to help. 320.391.5300 ## Ordering Process You can design your sign online using our online designer, upload your own print ready artwork files or work with one of our graphic designers to create a custom yard sign. #### Online Designer * Pick a template and design yard sign * Add to cart * Select yard sign finishing options * Select shipping method * Enter payment information * Order complete #### Upload a File * Upload file * Add to cart * Select yard sign finishing options * Select shipping method * Proof is emailed to you * Once proof is approved & payment is received order is complete #### Let us Design * Upload any files & provide yard sign instructions * Designer will create a yard sign proof * Proof is emailed to you * Once proof is approved & payment is received order is complete ### Payment All signs must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Vis
